en: A prayer of Habakkuk the prophet, according to Shigionoth.
zh: 哈巴谷先知的禱告，配激動的音調。

en: O LORD, I have heard the report of you, and your work, O LORD, do I fear. In the midst of the years revive it; in the midst of the years make it known; in wrath remember mercy.
zh: 耶和華啊！我聽見你的聲音，懼怕你的作為； 求你在這些年間復興，在這些年間彰顯， 發怒的時候以憐憫為懷。

en: God came from Teman, and the Holy One from Mount Paran. His splendor covered the heavens, and the earth was full of his praise. Selah
zh: 神由提幔而來，聖者從巴蘭山臨到。 他的榮光瀰漫穹蒼，讚美他的聲音響徹大地。

en: His brightness was like the light; rays flashed from his hand; and there he veiled his power.
zh: 他的輝煌如光，手中四射光芒，就在其中隱藏著能力。

en: Before him went pestilence, and plague followed at his heels.
zh: 瘟疫在他面前行走，災病在他腳下發出。

en: He stood and measured the earth; he looked and shook the nations; then the eternal mountains were scattered; the everlasting hills sank low. His were the everlasting ways.
zh: 他站立，震撼全地； 他觀看，驚散列國。 永在的山崩裂，長存的嶺塌陷； 他的道路存到永遠。

en: I saw the tents of Cushan in affliction; the curtains of the land of Midian did tremble.
zh: 我看見古珊的帳棚遭難，米甸地的帳幕驚惶。

en: Was your wrath against the rivers, O LORD? Was your anger against the rivers, or your indignation against the sea, when you rode on your horses, on your chariot of salvation?
zh: 耶和華啊！你騎上你的馬，乘駕得勝的戰車， 難道是惱怒江河、向江河發怒、向海洋洩憤？

en: You stripped the sheath from your bow, calling for many arrows. Selah You split the earth with rivers.
zh: 你的弓顯露，你的箭上弦。 你裂開大地為江河。

en: The mountains saw you and writhed; the raging waters swept on; the deep gave forth its voice; it lifted its hands on high.
zh: 諸山見你而顫抖， 眾水暴流而過； 深淵發聲，舉手高揚。

en: The sun and moon stood still in their place at the light of your arrows as they sped, at the flash of your glittering spear.
zh: 日月停在本位， 你的箭發射如光； 你的矛閃爍輝耀。

en: You marched through the earth in fury; you threshed the nations in anger.
zh: 你激憤踐踏全地，你懷怒打碎列國。

en: You went out for the salvation of your people, for the salvation of your anointed. You crushed the head of the house of the wicked, laying him bare from thigh to neck. Selah
zh: 你出來救拔子民，拯救你所膏立的。 你擊打惡人的房頂， 使根基全然顯露 。

en: You pierced with his own arrows the heads of his warriors, who came like a whirlwind to scatter me, rejoicing as if to devour the poor in secret.
zh: 你用他的槍，刺透他戰士的頭。 他們來如暴風，把我們驅散。 他們的喜好，是暗中吞噬窮人。

en: You trampled the sea with your horses, the surging of mighty waters.
zh: 你乘馬馳騁海上，大水洶湧翻騰。

en: I hear, and my body trembles; my lips quiver at the sound; rottenness enters into my bones; my legs tremble beneath me. Yet I will quietly wait for the day of trouble to come upon people who invade us.
zh: 我一聽見，就全身發抖； 因這聲音，我嘴唇震顫。 腐爛侵蝕我骨，我在站立之地戰兢。 我靜候災難之日，犯境的民上來。

en: Though the fig tree should not blossom, nor fruit be on the vines, the produce of the olive fail and the fields yield no food, the flock be cut off from the fold and there be no herd in the stalls,
zh: 無花果樹縱不發芽，葡萄樹不結果， 橄欖樹無所出，田裡無收成， 圈內的羊被剪除，棚裡也沒有牛，

en: yet I will rejoice in the LORD; I will take joy in the God of my salvation.
zh: 我卻要因耶和華歡喜， 以救我的 神為樂。

en: GOD, the Lord, is my strength; he makes my feet like the deer's; he makes me tread on my high places. To the choirmaster: with stringed instruments.
zh: 主耶和華是我的力量， 他使我的腳快如母鹿的蹄，在高地上行走。 交詩班長，用絲弦的樂器伴奏。
